demo.title: trustlayer-sybil-scanner.sh
demo.code:
# Sybil scan an ERC-8004 agent on Base
curl -s "https://api.thetrustlayer.xyz/trust/base:1378"

# Check a reviewer's credibility
curl -s "https://api.thetrustlayer.xyz/reviewer/0xABC...123"

# See all agents owned by a wallet across chains
curl -s "https://api.thetrustlayer.xyz/owner/0xABC...123"

# Get network-wide Sybil stats
curl -s "https://api.thetrustlayer.xyz/stats"

setup: No install required — all endpoints are plain HTTP
